features: SUPER VALUE PACK - This pack of 50 seam free hair ties allows you to save money and never be without a hair tie when you need them most.

QUALITY SEAMLESS HAIR TIES - Premium, soft, stretchy fabric hair bobbles which are suitable for all hair types. This means no matter your hair texture, your hairstyle will stay in place all day, no matter your lifestyle. These hair bands are metal-free and allow you to tie your hair up without pulling or tangling.
THICK HAIR FRIENDLY- With a thickness of 8mm, these strong hair bands can be used for any hairstyle. You can make braids, ponytails and buns with ease without the worry of snapping or slipping.

EXPANSIVE COLOUR RANGE — We have hair bands to suit everyone, whether you prefer a discreet look with our neutral tones or want to show off your colourful side with our bright and pastel multipacks. Shop our range to explore our ever-expanding selection — perfect as stocking fillers for women or girls’ gifts.
PERFECT FOR SCHOOL UNIFORM- Acheive that seamless look all term with bobbles that match your school uniform
